 esac;
 eval "$($LMOD_CMD shell "$@")" && eval "$(${LMOD_SETTARG_CMD:-:} -s sh)";
 eval ${which_declare} ) | /usr/bin/which --tty-only --read-alias --read-functions --show-tilde --show-dot $@
 fi;
 fi;
 fi;
 if [ -n "${__lmod_sh_dbg:-}" ]; then
 if [ -n "${__lmod_sh_dbg:-}" ]; then
 return $__lmod_my_status
 set +$__lmod_sh_dbg;
 set -$__lmod_sh_dbg;
